full_text: M Theekshana to Warner, Caught by Shanaka!! Warner throws his head back in disappointment. The batter who looked good is gone as Theekshana strikes off the first ball. That was a doled up delivery outside off, Warner creamed the drive on the up but didn't keep it down. The man at cover leapt forward and took it inches off the turf. That was a sharp take and Lanka making a match out of this.

They already have given away 9 runs without Australia having had to work too hard for it
